defects.evidence: Tx_Hwmark default 9 entries; >512 B frames hit underrun before frame fully buffered, deliver as constant ~2,560 B GIANT wire frames regardless of input size. VCD-confirmed (Tx_en stays HIGH continuously through full 20.4-20.5 µs span) and lever-experiment-confirmed (HWM = 31 collapses 4 GIANTs to 0).
defects.workaround: CSR-write Tx_Hwmark >= 31 entries (5'h1F) before any TX traffic

defects.evidence: MAC_rx_FF.v SYS_wait_end → SYS_idle requires !Rx_mac_rd; perpetual-ready hosts (modern AXI-Stream-style ingress) wedge after frame 0 EOP and never receive subsequent frames. VCD-confirmed (FSM transitions from SYS_read → SYS_wait_end at first EOP and never moves again across 1.4 Mns sim).
defects.workaround: BFM/host pulses Rx_mac_rd low for one cycle after each EOP
